business.name: Ember & Oak Bistro
business.tagline: Wood-fired food. Honest ingredients. Good company.
business.description: A neighborhood bistro specializing in wood-fired dishes made from locally sourced ingredients. Open since 2018.

hero.headline: Fire-kissed flavors, rooted in community.
hero.subheadline: Seasonal menus. Local farms. A table worth gathering around.

services.name: Dinner Service
services.description: Our full à la carte menu featuring wood-fired mains, house-made pastas, and rotating seasonal specials.

services.name: Sunday Brunch
services.description: Leisurely weekend mornings with eggs, baked goods, and mimosas.

services.name: Private Events
services.description: Full restaurant buyouts and curated group menus for celebrations and corporate dinners.

about.headline: Food that starts with the land.
about.body: Ember & Oak was born from a simple belief: great food starts with great ingredients. We work directly with 12 local farms across Ontario to bring the best seasonal produce to your table — then let fire do the rest.

testimonials.author: Maria C.
testimonials.quote: The best meal I've had in Toronto in years. Every dish felt thoughtful and deeply considered.

testimonials.author: James T.
testimonials.quote: Incredible atmosphere. The wood-fired lamb is an absolute must-order.

testimonials.author: Priya S.
testimonials.quote: We booked Ember & Oak for our rehearsal dinner and it was absolutely perfect.

seo.title: Ember & Oak Bistro | Wood-Fired Dining in Toronto
seo.description: Toronto's favorite neighborhood bistro. Wood-fired dishes, local ingredients, Sunday brunch. Reserve your table today.
